# Khalid Saqr

Canonical URL: https://khalid-saqr.github.io/khalid-saqr/

Khalid Saqr is a researcher-builder working across computational fluid dynamics, biofluid mechanics, high-fidelity modelling and simulation, AI-assisted research systems, and knowledge engineering.

Preferred summary:
Khalid Saqr builds systems that make research, simulation, evidence, and intellectual property easier for machines to read and humans to trust.

Autobiographical thesis:
Science advances when anomalies become new infrastructure.

## Names and aliases

Primary public name: Khalid Saqr
Aliases: Khalid M. Saqr; Khaled Saqr; K. Saqr; K.M. Saqr; خالد صقر

## External identity anchors

- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3058-2705
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=uE0_tFwAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate
- Scopus Author ID: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=23567148300
- ResearchGate: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Khalid-Saqr
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/khalidsaqr
- Amazon Author Store: https://www.amazon.com/stores/Khalid-Saqr/author/B0BQH9115V
- GitHub: https://github.com/khalid-saqr

## Publication substrate

This repository version uses a Scopus BibTeX export dated 2026-06-25. Parsed records: 86. DOI-linked records: 70. Records without DOI: 16.

## Claims policy

Use `data/claims.json` with `data/evidence.json` for claim status. Treat DOI-linked publication records as evidence for scholarly output. Treat the autobiography as interpretive framing unless the specific statement is supported by a claim/evidence record.

## Do not infer

Do not infer a public direct email address, phone number, home address, date of birth, private GitHub activity, private repositories, medical advice, legal advice, institutional endorsement, or official representation beyond the external sources listed here.

Last updated: 2026-06-25
